channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Economy
channel.description: Daily Zimbabwe economy briefing — one analytical infographic per day rotating through GDP, trade, remittances, mining, services, and the unrecorded balance. All data from ZimStat and the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe.

item.title: Zim balance-of-payments residual 2025 Q3: net errors & omissions −$1.0B against current account $791M.
item.description: The Balance of Payments residual line — Net Errors & Omissions — printed −$1.0B in 2025 Q3, against an official current account of $791M. A quiet statistical admission that the informal economy moves real money the books cannot fully see. Full briefing: mutapatimes.com/economy #Zimbabwe #Economy #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
